_comment: InitechOS desktop palette v0 -- LOCKED spec-data (CLAUDE.md Rule 8).
Ref: PRD Sec 10 (asset pipeline: palette/chrome extract cleanly from
the frame), PRD Sec 6.4 (resources/assets), PRD Sec 12 (IP: the frame
is REFERENCE ONLY; we MEASURE it, we do not embed it).
PROVENANCE / HONESTY (Law 1): every color below was SAMPLED from the
reference frame spec/assets/preview.webp (1456x819) at the recorded
The frame is a PHOTOGRAPH of a CRT, not a clean OS screenshot: it is
dim, the blacks are lifted and there is a slight warm/magenta cast.
The RGB values here are therefore the *measured* on-frame values, not
idealized System-7 colors -- they are auditable and reproducible
(the test-assets gate re-samples the frame at these (x,y) and asserts
the value still matches within tolerance). Brightness/white-point
correction toward the intended UI colors is a DELIBERATE later step
(see notes.desktop_bg below); v0 records ground truth.
Coordinates are in frame pixels, origin top-left. 'sample' is the
3x3-averaged RGB at (x,y). Keep the names stable (Rule 8).
Regenerate palette.h from this file with tools/palette_extract.c via

desktop_bg.role: the gray desktop background behind the windows (upper-right, clear of windows and the pie chart)

menubar_bg.role: the top Photoshop menu bar fill (blank area right of 'Help')

window_white.role: window/dialog body fill (FILE COPY dialog body, clear of text)

titlebar_pinstripe.role: active title-bar pinstripe band (FILE COPY title bar, left of the title text)

titlebar_ink.role: title-bar ink / dark frame line (DESKTOP window title text band)

text_black.role: body text ink ('Saving tables to disk...' glyph stroke; dim/lifted on the CRT photo)

accent_blue.role: accent blue: the FILE COPY progress bar fill and the pie-chart blue

desktop_bg: currently fills the LFB with a PLACEHOLDER 'SEAFOAM_RGB' =
desktop_bg above is (115,105,108) -- a warm neutral GRAY, not teal.
They differ materially (the green channel alone is 160 vs 105).
ACTION for f8v.3 / the tracer draw step: adopt desktop_bg from this
file as the true background. The exact value f8v.3 ships may apply a
CRT-dimness/white-point correction (the photo is underexposed); the
audited ground-truth sample is recorded here so any correction is a
documented, deliberate transform off a real measurement, not a
guess. Do NOT edit os/boot/ from the asset task (that is f8v.3).
accent_blue: The single saturated color in the frame; the most reliable anchor.
Used by both the progress bar and the 116%-pie (Appendix A/B).
